blended.narrative: Silver Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 53°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 8.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 6" over the past week. Current depth: 40".
